g.text: Flame Graph Anatomy: Reading the Visualization

div.p: WRONG! X-axis has NO temporal meaning. Samples are collapsed; order is arbitrary. Left-to-right is NOT start-to-finish.
WRONG! Height = stack depth only. A tall, thin stack is a deep call chain that happens rarely.
CORRECT! Look for wide leaf boxes. Width is proportional to CPU samples. Wide = function was on-CPU often.
CORRECT! Parent width is inclusive. It includes all cycles spent in children. Leaf width is primarily self-time.
